name: ecap-backend
description: ECAP serverless API — Node.js, TypeScript, DynamoDB

scripts.deploy: serverless deploy --stage dev && tsx scripts/print-stack-outputs.ts --stage dev
scripts.deploy:dev: serverless deploy --stage dev && tsx scripts/print-stack-outputs.ts --stage dev
scripts.deploy:prod: serverless deploy --stage prod && tsx scripts/print-stack-outputs.ts --stage prod
scripts.info: serverless info --stage dev && tsx scripts/print-stack-outputs.ts --stage dev
scripts.info:dev: serverless info --stage dev && tsx scripts/print-stack-outputs.ts --stage dev
scripts.info:prod: serverless info --stage prod && tsx scripts/print-stack-outputs.ts --stage prod
